description: Factagora provides a verification and knowledge-graph platform for grounding AI outputs in source-backed, time-aware facts and causal relationships. Its products include search and verification APIs, fingerprinting/content provenance features, and MCP-based AI assistant integration.
summary: Factagora exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API with an OpenAPI spec, a remote MCP server at https://api.factagora.com/mcp, and an npm-distributed MCP server CLI.
